description: Baseline happy path — 3 valid records, all posted, reconciliation passes
purpose: Control case: proves the replay harness, Testcontainers setup, DB queries, and reporting all work end to end. If this fails, the environment is broken, not the scenarios.
whatWouldBreakThis: Any harness breakage, fixture drift, database setup issue, or posting/reconciliation regression would cause the baseline control case to fail.
